prompt: {"type":"Japanese fitness gym promotional landing-page hero banner","style":"clean feminine wellness advertising, soft natural light, premium but approachable, realistic commercial photography with editorial layout","canvas":{"aspect_ratio":"16:10","background":"bright modern personal gym interior"},"scene":{"location":"private training gym with cable machine and pale interior walls","subjects":[{"role":"client","gender":"female","age":"30s to 40s","position":"right foreground","pose":"mid squat or lunge while holding a padded barbell across her shoulders","clothing":"white short-sleeve workout top tied at the waist, mauve pink high-waisted leggings, hair tied back in a low ponytail"},{"role":"trainer","gender":"female","age":"young adult","position":"center background behind client","pose":"assisting and spotting the client with hands near the bar","clothing":"black fitted T-shirt and black leggings, hair tied back"}],"composition":"split layout with a large text block on the left and the workout photo dominating the right and center; trainer partially behind client; gym machine frame visible on the far right; a small potted plant softly blurred in the back left of the photo area"},"text":{"headline_badge":"30代から40代の女性のための","main_headline_lines":["私らしく、","理想のカラダへ。"],"subheadline_lines":["パーソナルジムで","無理なく、確実に。"],"benefit_circles":["完全個室","女性専用も安心","手ぶらOK"],"benefit_circle_subtexts":["","","ウェア・タオル貸出無料"],"bottom_left_copy_lines":["変わるのは、","今がいちばん早い。"],"feature_items":["あなたに合わせたオーダーメイドトレーニング","食事サポートで無理なく続く","ダイエットもボディメイクもおまかせ"],"cta_badge":"無料カウンセリング","cta_main":"受付中！","cta_button":"今すぐ予約する"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"hero text area","position":"left","count":3,"labels":["30代から40代の女性のための","私らしく、理想のカラダへ。","パーソナルジムで 無理なく、確実に。"]},{"title":"circular benefits","position":"lower left-middle","count":3,"labels":["完全個室","女性専用も安心","手ぶらOK"]},{"title":"bottom feature bar","position":"bottom full width","count":4,"labels":["変わるのは、今がいちばん早い。","あなたに合わせたオーダーメイドトレーニング","食事サポートで無理なく続く","ダイエットもボディメイクもおまかせ"]},{"title":"call to action","position":"bottom right","count":3,"labels":["無料カウンセリング","受付中！","今すぐ予約する"]}],"text_panel":"off-white translucent rectangle covering the left half","bottom_band":"dusty pink full-width footer band with white divider lines and simple line icons","cta_shape":"large cream-colored circle overlapping the bottom right corner"},"design":{"palette":{"primary":"dusty pink","secondary":"cream","text_dark":"charcoal gray","accent":"muted gold"},"typography":"elegant Japanese Mincho-style serif for headline, clean readable Japanese body text, soft feminine spacing","icons":["lock icon","female silhouette icon","shirt and bottle icon","clipboard icon","fork and knife icon","upward growth chart icon","right arrow icon button"],"mood":"reassuring, refined, motivating, female-focused, trustworthy"},"quality":"high-resolution polished ad creative, realistic skin and fabric, balanced natural lighting, shallow depth of field"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"日本健身房推广落地页 Hero Banner","style":"干净、女性化、健康广告风格，柔和自然光，高端且亲和，具有编辑排版感的写实商业摄影","canvas":{"aspect_ratio":"16:10","background":"明亮现代的个人健身房内部"},"scene":{"location":"带有拉力器械和浅色内墙的私人训练健身房","subjects":[{"role":"client","gender":"女性","age":"30 至 40 岁","position":"右侧前景","pose":"正在做深蹲或弓步，肩上扛着带衬垫的杠铃","clothing":"白色短袖运动上衣在腰间打结，藕粉色高腰紧身裤，低马尾发型"},{"role":"trainer","gender":"女性","age":"年轻成人","position":"中心背景，位于客户身后","pose":"协助并保护客户，双手靠近杠铃","clothing":"黑色修身 T 恤和黑色紧身裤，束发"}],"composition":"分割式布局，左侧为大面积文本块，右侧和中心为健身照片；教练部分位于客户身后；健身器械框架可见于最右侧；照片左后方有一盆柔焦的小盆栽"},"text":{"headline_badge":"专为 30 至 40 岁女性打造","main_headline_lines":["活出自我，","塑造理想身材。"],"subheadline_lines":["在个人健身房，","轻松且高效。"],"benefit_circles":["完全独立包间","女性专用更安心","空手即可到店"],"benefit_circle_subtexts":["","","免费提供运动服和毛巾"],"bottom_left_copy_lines":["改变，","现在就是最好的时机。"],"feature_items":["为您量身定制的训练计划","饮食支持，轻松坚持","减肥与塑形兼顾"],"cta_badge":"免费咨询","cta_main":"火热预约中！","cta_button":"立即预约"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"hero text area","position":"左侧","count":3,"labels":["专为 30 至 40 岁女性打造","活出自我，塑造理想身材。","在个人健身房，轻松且高效。"]},{"title":"circular benefits","position":"左下至中间","count":3,"labels":["完全独立包间","女性专用更安心","空手即可到店"]},{"title":"bottom feature bar","position":"底部全宽","count":4,"labels":["改变，现在就是最好的时机。","为您量身定制的训练计划","饮食支持，轻松坚持","减肥与塑形兼顾"]},{"title":"call to action","position":"右下角","count":3,"labels":["免费咨询","火热预约中！","立即预约"]}],"text_panel":"覆盖左半部分的米白色半透明矩形","bottom_band":"带有白色分隔线和简约线条图标的灰粉色全宽页脚栏","cta_shape":"覆盖右下角的奶油色大圆圈"},"design":{"palette":{"primary":"灰粉色","secondary":"奶油色","text_dark":"炭灰色","accent":"柔金色"},"typography":"标题采用优雅的日式明朝体，正文采用清晰易读的日文字体，柔和的女性化间距","icons":["锁图标","女性剪影图标","衬衫和水瓶图标","剪贴板图标","刀叉图标","向上增长图表图标","右箭头按钮图标"],"mood":"令人安心、精致、励志、以女性为中心、值得信赖"},"quality":"高分辨率精美广告素材，真实的皮肤和织物纹理，平衡的自然光，浅景深效果"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 日本女性健身房 Hero Banner：此提示词用于生成精美的日本个人健身房广告横幅，目标群体为 30 至 40 岁的女性，适用于落地页、社交媒体广告或健身工作室推广。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.text: 要求可读；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, editorial, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: natural light, shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
要求可读；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
